name: Time Zone
original_name: โซนนี้มีคนจอง
overview: When Time, a junior from the lowest-ranking class, crosses paths with Zone, the top-class student council president, their opposite worlds collide. Caught skipping class, Time misses his chance to make amends and ends up in the disciplinary office. What starts as a grudge turns into playful teasing, leading to an unexpected kiss between the two. As their relationship deepens, it extends into their university years.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL PILOT | TIME ZONE The Series | STAR HUNTER 2025 #โซนนี้มีคนจอง
